allow: Bash(php -r 'foreach\(["crm_main","crm_education_vibes"] as $db\){$m=new mysqli\("localhost","root","",$db,3306\); $r=$m->query\("SHOW COLUMNS FROM client_staff LIKE \\"deleted_at\\""\); echo "$db.client_staff.deleted_at: ".\($r->num_rows?"OK":"MISSING"\)."\\n";}')
